chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-408 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Non-Prosecution 14-04-2025 None present for the applicant. **** None present for the applicant; no intimation is received so far; same was the position on the last date of hearing. Record reflects that though on 03.02.2025, notices were ordered to be issued to other side, but up-till-now, the applicant has failed to supply copies for issuance of notice to other side, which reflects the applicant and his counsel are not interested in proceeding with this matter. Result thereof, instant Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
